scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm contract && pnpm run docs && pnpm run schema-contract && pnpm run migration-check && pnpm run package-surface && pnpm run api-report && pnpm run secret-scan && pnpm run artifact-safety && pnpm run repository-hygiene && pnpm run validation-registry && pnpm run ci-contract && pnpm run compatibility && pnpm run external-compatibility && pnpm run license-report && pnpm run release-readiness && pnpm run performance-smoke && pnpm run process-tree-smoke && pnpm run smoke
scripts.contract: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @0disoft/mcp-security-proxy-contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @0disoft/mcp-security-proxy-core test
scripts.package-surface: pnpm build && node scripts/check-package-surface.mjs && node scripts/check-package-consumer.mjs
scripts.release-readiness: node scripts/check-release-readiness.mjs && node scripts/check-publication-records.mjs && node scripts/check-npm-bootstrap-plan.mjs && node scripts/prepare-npm-bootstrap-artifacts.mjs --dry-run
scripts.smoke: pnpm build && node packages/cli/dist/main.js check-policy --policy fixtures/policies/local-dev.json --json && node packages/cli/dist/main.js eval-call --policy fixtures/policies/local-dev.json --profile local --input fixtures/mcp/call-file-read-denied.json --json && node scripts/smoke-live-run.mjs
